resource_security.label: Secure the ledger
resource_security.description: Keep average resource sufficiency at 70% or higher.

stem_emigration.label: Stem the exodus
stem_emigration.description: End the year with immigration meeting or beating emigration.

raise_qol.label: Lift the people
raise_qol.description: Raise national average quality of life to 55 or higher.

heal_land.label: Heal the land
heal_land.description: Restore environment health to 60 or higher.

grow_population.label: Grow the realm
grow_population.description: End the year with more living citizens than you began it.

tighten_ledger.label: Tighten the ledger
tighten_ledger.description: Keep average resource sufficiency at 80% or higher.
